column1: # Full-set vs unanimous-pass-subset paired contrasts in the Table 1 code-arm-vs-cheapest-rival layout. Cost-adj on the unanimous-pass subset uses the cache-floor median recomputed on that subset per the scripts/collect_results.py:_apply_cache_floor_adjustment methodology. _mean_delta_pct is relative % vs rival for cost/input/output metrics; for the 'pass' metric it is Δ in percentage points (mean * 100). wilcoxon_p is paired Wilcoxon signed-rank two-sided.
